evidence.title: Cyber Resilience Framework Document
evidence.description: Board-approved CRF policy document covering Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, Recover phases

evidence.title: Board CRF Approval Minutes
evidence.description: Board meeting minutes documenting formal approval and endorsement of the CRF

evidence.title: CISO Appointment Letter
evidence.description: Formal appointment letter for the Chief Information Security Officer with defined reporting lines

evidence.title: Cyber Risk Function Charter
evidence.description: Charter establishing the dedicated cyber risk function, mandate, authority, and independence

evidence.title: Cyber Risk Register
evidence.description: Comprehensive register of identified cyber risks with likelihood, impact, controls, and residual ratings

evidence.title: Cyber Risk Assessment Reports
evidence.description: Periodic cyber risk assessment reports presented to the board risk committee

evidence.title: Threat Escalation Records
evidence.description: Records of cyber threat escalations to senior management and board, including timelines and outcomes

evidence.title: Board Cyber Risk Oversight Minutes
evidence.description: Board and board committee meeting minutes documenting oversight of cyber risk posture and CRF effectiveness

evidence.title: Cyber Risk Function Organisational Chart
evidence.description: Organisational chart showing CISO reporting line, cyber risk function structure, and independence from IT operations

evidence.title: CRF Annual Review Report
evidence.description: Annual review of the CRF documenting changes, lessons learned, and improvement actions

evidence.title: NCII Designation Letter
evidence.description: NACSA letter designating systems as National Critical Information Infrastructure

evidence.title: NACSA Compliance Records
evidence.description: Records of compliance with NACSA directives and additional security measures for NCII systems

evidence.title: Additional Directive Compliance Evidence
evidence.description: Evidence of compliance with any additional NACSA or BNM directives related to NCII

evidence.title: Network Zone Architecture Diagram
evidence.description: Network segmentation diagram showing DMZ, internal zones, database zones, and management zones with traffic flow

evidence.title: Firewall Rule Base Export
evidence.description: Export of firewall configurations and rule sets deployed at critical network segments

evidence.description: Records of periodic firewall rule base reviews including cleanup of stale rules and exceptions

evidence.title: IPS Deployment Records
evidence.description: IPS/IDS deployment evidence showing coverage of critical network segments and signature update status

evidence.title: Web and Email Filtering Configuration
evidence.description: Configuration exports from web proxy and email gateway filtering solutions

evidence.description: Report showing endpoint protection coverage percentage, signature currency, and unprotected device list

evidence.title: NAC Configuration Evidence
evidence.description: Network Access Control configuration showing authentication policies and device compliance checks

evidence.title: Wireless Security Configuration
evidence.description: Wireless network security configurations including WPA3/WPA2-Enterprise settings and rogue AP detection

evidence.title: APT Detection Solution Deployment
evidence.description: Evidence of APT detection and sandboxing solution deployment covering network and email traffic

evidence.title: DNS Security Configuration
evidence.description: DNS security configuration including DNSSEC, DNS sinkholing, and DNS query logging

evidence.description: Screenshots and configuration of network traffic analysis tools showing baseline and anomaly detection

evidence.title: DDoS Mitigation Subscription

evidence.description: Evidence of NTP synchronisation across all critical systems to authoritative time sources

evidence.title: Encryption Configuration Standards
